# Single-node cluster commits a batch of proposals in one stabilize round.
# Verifies that several entries appended before a Ready all commit together
# (quorum is the node itself), and indices/commit advance accordingly.

add-nodes id=1 voters=1
----
INFO 1 switched to configuration voters=(1)
INFO 1 became follower at term 0

campaign id=1
----
INFO 1 is starting a new election
INFO 1 became StateCandidate at term 1

stabilize
----
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateCandidate term=1 commit=0
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateLeader term=1 commit=0
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateLeader term=1 commit=1

propose id=1 data=a
----
ok

propose id=1 data=b
----
ok

propose id=1 data=c
----
ok

stabilize
----
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateLeader term=1 commit=1
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateLeader term=1 commit=4

status id=1
----
id=1 state=StateLeader term=1 lead=1 commit=4 lastIndex=4
